questionHtml:
What can lead to the emergence of analogous structures?


A.  Divergent evolution from a recent common ancestor

B.  Convergent evolution of unrelated species

C.  Splits in the fundamental niche of a species

D.  Splits in the realized niche of a species

meta.title: What can lead to the emergence of analogous structures? A. Divergent evolution from a recent common ancestor B. Convergent evolution of unrelated species C. Splits in the fundament
breadcrumbLabels: A4.1.5. Convergent evolution as the origin of analogous structures
